care.summary: A bold, architectural houseplant with sword-like leaves atop a thick, woody cane.
care.light: Bright direct to indirect light; south or west window preferred
care.water: Water thoroughly when soil is completely dry; very drought tolerant
care.soil: Very well-draining cactus/succulent mix or sandy potting soil
care.humidity: Low; thrives in average dry indoor air
care.fertilizer: Dilute balanced fertilizer once in spring and once in summer only
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic to pets if ingested
common_issues: Root rot from overwatering — the #1 killer of yuccas
Brown leaf tips from inconsistent watering or dry air
Yellow lower leaves — natural shedding as it grows
Mealybugs in leaf axils and on stems
tips: Err on the side of underwatering — yuccas prefer neglect
Wipe leaves with a damp cloth to keep them dust-free
Rotate the plant quarterly for even growth
Cut back bare canes to encourage new growth from the cut point
